scope: production preflight guard for stale public Work video DTO responses before real load testing

validations.result: passed 6/6 after RED failure was observed before implementation

validations.command: for script in scripts/prod-runtime-preflight.sh scripts/prod-real-load-steps.sh scripts/promote-main-runtime.sh scripts/ci-compose-smoke.sh; do bash -n "$script"; done

risks: The check requires a real public Work detail with at least one video.
Current public production probes looked stale until the server pulls/recreates the newly published runtime image.
The guard is an operational preflight, not a full schema validator.
recommendation: Run prod-runtime-preflight.sh with REQUIRE_PUBLIC_WORK_VIDEO_CONTRACT=1 before the real load ladder; if it fails, fix deployment/runtime freshness before more backend performance code changes.
